mapper.select: select b.breed_id, b.category_id, c.name as category_name, b.code, b.name, b.sort, b.enabled, b.is_default from breed b left join category c on b.category_id = c.category_id where b.breed_id = #{breedId}

select b.breed_id, b.category_id, c.name as category_name, b.code, b.name, b.sort, b.enabled, b.is_default from breed b left join category c on b.category_id = c.category_id where b.category_id = #{categoryId} and b.enabled = 1 and b.is_default = 1 order by b.sort limit 1

select b.breed_id, b.category_id, c.name as category_name, b.code, b.name, b.sort, b.enabled, b.is_default from breed b left join category c on b.category_id = c.category_id where b.category_id = #{categoryId} and b.code = #{code} and b.enabled = 1 limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into breed
breed_id, category_id, code, name, sort, enabled, is_default,
#{breedId}, #{categoryId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{sort}, #{enabled}, #{defaultBreed},
mapper.delete:
delete from breed where breed_id in
#{breedId}
